author: Lily Ray
title: A Reflection on SEO, GEO & AI Search in 2025
content: This post covers the biggest changes in SEO and AI search in 2025, including observations and hot takes about where search is headed in 2026. The post discusses how 2025 was the year of GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), also known as AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), along with AI SEO, LLMO, and other emerging trends in the search landscape. The author shares reflections on the SEO and AI search industry evolution and predictions for 2026.
